expectations.text: Response correctly identifies D&C 76:22 as a non-Bible LDS reference
expectations.evidence: 'identifies the book abbreviation (D&C)... flags this request for specialized handling' and 'does not go to bible-api.com' -- correctly identified as non-Bible LDS

expectations.text: Response explains isLdsBibleRef returns false for this reference
expectations.evidence: Never mentions isLdsBibleRef. Describes the concept ('identifies... D&C is not a Bible book') but without the specific ARE function.

expectations.text: Response identifies scriptures.nephi.org as the routing target
expectations.evidence: Response mentions 'src/api/nephi.ts' as a hint but only suggests 'a custom-built backend or a community-maintained LDS scripture API' without naming scriptures.nephi.org. A developer would still need to find the correct API endpoint.

expectations.text: Response mentions LdsApiUnavailableError and the static fallback message
expectations.evidence: No mention of LdsApiUnavailableError or any specific error type. No fallback message. Without this, a scriptures.nephi.org failure produces an unhandled rejection.

needs_review: Without-skill mentioned 'src/api/nephi.ts' as a possible path -- possibly accessed the file system. However it did not read any skill file. The mention may be from the task description context that included 'similar LDS-specific files in your repository'.
